---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Publications, working papers, and ongoing projects"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## Research themes

The lab organises its work around three overlapping themes. Most projects sit at
the intersection of two or more.

- **Macroeconomic policy** — fiscal, monetary, growth diagnostics, and
  forecasting for national and subnational economies.
- **Trade & industrial policy** — CGE modeling (GTAP-RD/GDyn-FS), tariff and
  reciprocal-tariff analysis, structural transformation.
- **Applied econometrics & labour** — panel methods, gravity, and policy
  analysis for Indonesian micro and macro data, including wage and minimum-wage
  policy.

## Working papers

::: {.publication}
[[Forecasting Indonesian National and Provincial GDP using nighttime light index](https://dewanekonomi.go.id/publikasi/forecasting-indonesian-national-and-provincial-gdp-using-nighttime-light-index)]{.pub-title}

[I Made Krisna Gupta, Timothy Kinmekita Ginting, Meizahra Afidatie]{.pub-authors}

[DEN Working Paper · 9 February 2026]{.pub-meta}

[Macro]{.tag} [Forecasting]{.tag} [Nighttime Lights]{.tag}
:::

::: {.publication}
[[Alpha (α): Operasionalisasi Parameter Passthrough dari Pertumbuhan Ekonomi ke Penyesuaian Upah Minimum di Indonesia](https://dewanekonomi.go.id/publikasi/alpha-a-operasionalisasi-parameter-passthrough-dari-pertumbuhan-ekonomi-ke-penyesuaian-upah-minimum-di-indonesia)]{.pub-title}

[Arief Anshory Yusuf, Mochammad Firman Hidayat, Bertha Fania Maula, Meizahra Afidatie, Devy Pratiwi]{.pub-authors}

[DEN Working Paper · 19 December 2025]{.pub-meta}

[Labour Economics]{.tag} [Minimum Wage]{.tag} [Macro]{.tag}
:::

::: {.publication}
[[Simulasi dampak Tarif Resiprokal Amerika Serikat terhadap perekonomian Indonesia dengan model GTAP](https://dewanekonomi.go.id/publikasi/simulasi-dampak-tarif-resiprokal-amerika-serikat-terhadap-perekonomian-indonesia-dengan-model-gtap)]{.pub-title}

[I Made Krisna Gupta, Arief Anshory Yusuf, Mochammad Firman Hidayat, M. Hafizh Ghifari Azizi, Shakuntala Anjani Nindraswari]{.pub-authors}

[DEN Working Paper · 20 October 2025]{.pub-meta}

[Trade]{.tag} [CGE]{.tag} [GTAP]{.tag}
:::

## Open-source tooling

We maintain a small set of open-source tools to keep our analysis reproducible
and consistent across team members:

- [**fig-den**](https://github.com/den-econ/fig-den) — matplotlib styling and
  chart helpers in DEN house style.
- [**ggden**](https://github.com/den-econ/ggden) — the ggplot2 equivalent for R.
- [**wp**](https://github.com/den-econ/wp) — Quarto template for working papers.
- [**deck**](https://github.com/den-econ/deck) — Quarto Beamer template for
  slide decks.

All lab repositories live at [github.com/den-econ](https://github.com/den-econ).
